Genera - The relational safety project. We empower teenagers to build healthy relationships through sexual education, relational intelligence, and equality. Because gender equality starts with education.

Follow Us

  • We empower teenagers to build healthy relationships through sexual education, relational intelligence, and equality.
    Because gender equality starts with education.

How It Works?

A new generation for a new era of relating

Mission

We equip teenagers with the tools to build healthy relationships in a digital and interconnected Europe. Through international experiences and interactive workshops, we create safe spaces where young people learn about sexuality, relational intelligence and equality, to prevent sexual, gender-based and cyber violence.

Vision

We envision a Europe where relational and sexual learning is valued as essential as academic education. Because the next generation deserves more than silence, confusion, or algorithms teaching them about relationships. They deserve education, dialogue, and better role models.

Values

Curiosity | Inclusivity | Safety | Empathy | Non-violent communication

What We Do?

Immersive training

Five days of training on sexual education, relational intelligence, and gender rights for teenagers.

Tailor-made workshops

3-hour workshops on a specific topic, e.g. Navigate digital spaces safely, Desire and consensual sex, Prevention of SGBV violence.

Podcast to amplify youth voices

We respond to teenagers' questions in a safe and confidential way.

Who we are?

Chiara Ferri

Relationship and Sexuality expert

Chiara is a somatic sex coach and embodiment mentor with an additional 12 years of expertise in wellbeing and HR. In 2022, she founded IntimaSee Coaching Lab, and since then has facilitated 1-1 sessions, workshops, retreats, and festivals worldwide focused on sexuality, relationships, and vulnerability. To date, she has supported 200+ individuals and couples. She brings her deep knowledge of human sexuality, empathetic listening, and relationally grounded facilitation skills to Genera.

LinkedIn

Eleonora Ungaro

Human rights and Advocacy expert

Eleonora is a human rights and advocacy expert with nine years of international experience in the social change sector. She is a strong advocate for the most vulnerable and actively challenges power structures. She has worked with more than 60 teenagers as Project Coordinator of an EU-funded project. She brings her deep knowledge of socio-political issues, analytical mindset, and strong advocacy skills to Genera.

LinkedIn

Emma Zamberlan

Strategic Project Manager

Emma is a project manager with years of experience coordinating projects and turning ideas into structured, impactful initiatives. She combines strong organisational skills with a collaborative and strategic approach to project development. She has long cultivated a strong passion for gender studies and intersectional education. She brings a strong focus on structure and coordination, transforming ideas into clear processes, sustainable strategies, and well-executed initiatives.
